quote: We booked the creators' LTS upgrade service (from €2,400) for three client sites and let Desiderio carry the whole frontend. PHPStan level max and the zero-tolerance template audit mean I trust every release — we have not patched a single frontend regression since, and the upgrade paid for itself on the first invoice we didn't have to write.
header: A single voice, front and center
